---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature would solve. For example: "As an administrator, I need to export a comparison report across multiple programs, but currently I can only export one program at a time."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why the proposed solution is preferred.

## Acceptance Criteria

Describe what "done" looks like for this feature. For example:
- The export button on the Analytics page generates a multi-program comparison in Excel format
- The file includes one sheet per program
- The file is named with the current date

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
